'''Agon Nine''', originally known as '''Turallon''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Agon system/Legends|Agon system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
Agon Nine was absorbed into [[Xim's empire]] as [[Xim/Legends|he]] expanded his borders from the [[Kingdom of Cron]] in [[25,127 BBY]]. With the collapse of the empire, Turallon would be forgotten for several centuries, until after the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]], it was discovered by [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] scouts.<ref name="TEA" />
